name: autoDream — Memory Consolidation
description: 自動整理記憶：偵測重複、矛盾、過時條目，轉換相對時間

schedulerEnabled.description: Enable the plugin's in-process timer. Set false when OpenClaw cron owns governance.

scanLimit.description: Max memories to scan per run

allowedScopes.description: Scopes allowed for background runs (default: global only)

supersessionEnabled.description: Detect newer memories that supersede older ones and include proposals in reports

supersessionApply.description: Apply high-confidence supersession metadata during scheduled runs. Metadata-only; does not delete memories.

supersessionMaxChangesPerRun.description: Maximum supersession metadata changes per scheduled run

llmEnabled.description: 啟用 LLM 輔助分析

llmApiKey.description: API key (falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var)

llmMaxCalls.description: Max LLM calls per dream run

embeddingModel.description: OpenAI embedding model for re-embedding merged memories. Requires llmApiKey. Default: text-embedding-3-small

governanceArtifactDir.description: Directory for governance lock, status, and run manifests
